title: Update success path to call persist_ssn and route NVM failure to dedicated path
description: After *oscore_opt_len set, call oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx); if it returns OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED then set ret and goto nvm_failed path; else ret=OSCORE_OK. Ensure this is after all sensitive data is prepared but before final return.
close_reason: Updated success path in oscore_protect_request after *oscore_opt_len set to explicitly set ret=OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED before goto nvm_failed on persist_ssn failure (and OSCORE_OK on success). Matches security requirements for SSN handling. Verified in oscore.c:1583-1589. Tests confirmed via Zephyr path.
